since_last: 44% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.82%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.92% · Gold -1.45% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 44% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.82%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.82%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.87%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -7.31%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +5.26%, PUBM +4.98%, SKHY +3.87%, CRNC +3.56%, AVAV +2.12%. Laggards: TSLA -7.31%, GOOGL -5.00%, NXPI -2.75%, AMZN -2.23%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.37% at $115.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
